name: Spinal Erectors (Erector Spinae)

landmarks.notes: Receives heavy indirect loading from squats, deadlifts, rows, and carries, so dedicated direct volume is usually low. Estimate only.

frequency_notes: Often sufficiently trained by compound lifts; add direct extension work if lagging.
training_notes: Deadlift variations and back extensions are the primary direct stimulus. Manage fatigue: the lumbar erectors are involved in many lifts.
